name: jellyfin-native-player-bridge
description: Local listener and Edge extension that bridge Jellyfin Web playback to a native media player.

scripts.check: runtime/node.exe --check service/src/index.js && runtime/node.exe --check extension/background.js && runtime/node.exe --check extension/content.js && runtime/node.exe --check extension/options.js && runtime/node.exe --check extension/popup.js

author: zixin-su
